problem id: b41b9628
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  00001110 -> 01110000
  10010111 -> 10111100
  11110101 -> 10101111
  10010110 -> 10110100
  11010000 -> 10000110
  00110111 -> 10111001
  01111101 -> 11101011
  11000111 -> 00111110

query: 11010100
predicted answer: 10100110
